title: The King's Epic Adventure 1
description:
King Harkinian's Grand Ambition! The World Will Eat My Shit!
This was just something i just felt like doing a long time ago, back when i still used moviemaker. Once I released it my views skyrocketed. Now I make one episode a year. 

When Link and Zelda refuse to eat the King's shit, the King gets upset & vows to travel the world & enforce his atrocious meal on everyone.
